name: io.github.xiaozhi666666/yapi-mcp
title: YApi MCP
description: Read YApi interface metadata by URL, interface ID, or project ID through MCP tools.

environmentVariables.name: YAPI_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Default YApi host, for example https://yapi.example.com. Optional when each tool call passes a full YApi URL.

environmentVariables.name: YAPI_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: YApi project token used for token-authenticated deployments.

environmentVariables.name: YAPI_COOKIE
environmentVariables.description: YApi login cookie for deployments that require browser/session authentication.
